title: Update 4 - Install Flow and Stability
notes:
Update 4 - Install Flow and Stability

- First installs now use the default library directly instead of forcing a location selection.
- Install behavior preference is now consistently honored in Library and Detail install actions.
- Stability and release metadata sync improvements for cleaner updater rollout.
notesList: First installs now use the default library directly instead of forcing a location selection.
Install behavior preference is now consistently honored in Library and Detail install actions.
Stability and release metadata sync improvements for cleaner updater rollout.
